notes:
fix(desktop): bundle full JDK runtime; clearer dropdowns and client validation

- Set includeAllModules so the jpackage Windows runtime always has the
  modules the embedded backend (Netty/H2/HikariCP/Exposed) needs at startup,
  fixing the recurring "Failed to launch JVM" error.
- Add a shared LabeledDropdown component (outlined, accent-bordered, ▾ arrow)
  and use it for the client type, delivery type, client/enum selectors on the
  client and order screens so the controls read as tappable.
- Validate ЄДРПОУ/РНОКПП on the client form (8 digits company / 10 person),
  matching the ФОП profile checks.
- Reorder OrderStatus enum so outsource states sit after the main flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
